name: Deli Brisket Bake
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the brisket on a sheet of aluminum foil.
2. Spread prepared mustard and whole mixed pickling spices evenly on both sides of the brisket.
3. Wrap the foil tightly around the brisket and place it in an 8 x 10 baking dish.
4. Bake in a slow oven (225 degrees F.) for 3 1/2 hours, or until the brisket is done.
5. Remove the brisket from the foil and scrape off and discard any remaining pickling spices. Trim excess fat.
6. Cut the brisket into 4 to 6 equal portions and place them in the baking dish with the sauerkraut.
7. Rinse and drain the sauerkraut, then add it on top of the brisket pieces.
8. Sprinkle grated Swiss cheese over the sauerkraut.
9. Place under a broiler until the cheese is browned, about 8 to 10 minutes.
10. Garnish with prepared mustard before serving.
